heading: Penalty for failure of brewer to comply with requirements and to keep records and file returns
label: 5672 Penalty for failure of brewer to comply with requirements and to keep records and file returns
text: Every brewer who, otherwise than with intent to defraud the United States, fails or refuses to keep the records and file the returns required by section 5415 and regulations issued pursuant thereto, or refuses to permit any internal revenue officer to inspect his records in the manner provided, or violates any of the provisions of subchapter G or regulations issued pursuant thereto shall be fined not more than $1,000, or imprisoned not more than 1 year, or both, for each such offense.
notes: Prior ProvisionsA prior section 5672, , , consisted of provisions similar to those comprising this section, prior to the general revision of this chapter by .act Aug. 16, 1954, ch. 73668A Stat. 696Pub. L. 85–859
